R

RandomController - Class in com.example.simul2d.JavaFX
Controller for the "Random" pane that places a user-specified number of entities or materials at random positions on the grid.

RECTANGLE - Enum constant in enum class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.ToolsType
 
RectangleEntityCommand - Record Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands
Command to fill a rectangular area (inclusive) with entities of the specified type.
RectangleEntityCommand(Vec2, Vec2, Entities) - Constructor for record class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.RectangleEntityCommand
Creates an instance of a RectangleEntityCommand record class.
RectangleMaterialCommand - Record Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands
Command to fill a rectangular area (inclusive) with the provided material.

Creates an instance of a RectangleMaterialCommand record class.

refreshUI() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.HelloController
Called periodically by the simulation loop to refresh the UI.
refreshUI() - Method in interface com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.NeedsSimulationState
Optional method to refresh the UI based on the current state.
refreshUI() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.SaveController
Refreshes the UI from the simulation state.
refreshUI() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.TimeController
Refreshes all UI elements that depend on the simulation state.
removeEntity(Entities) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.grid.Cell
 
RemoveEntityCommand - Record Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands
Command to remove one entity of the specified type at the given position.

render() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Core.SimulationLoop
 
resetGrowth() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.Mold
Resets the growth back to zero.
resetSimulation() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Core.SimulationState
 
run() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.InputReader
Starts the blocking input loop and forwards lines to InputHandler.queue.
runSimulation(ConsoleRenderSystem, InputHandler) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Core.SimulationLoop
Executes the simulation loop until SimulationLoop.stop() is called.
